prompt: Create a dramatic widescreen anime fighting-game character poster featuring KING, a stylish blond female martial artist in a deep purple tuxedo suit. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal key visual, high-contrast cinematic composition, dark cosmic black background filled with violet energy, sparks, smoke, speed lines, lens flares, and shattered glowing particles. Layout: show exactly 2 depictions of the same character: 1) a full-body action pose on the left, leaning back and extending one gloved hand toward the viewer, wearing a purple fitted blazer and trousers, white dress shirt, black bow tie, black fingerless gloves, short layered blond bob hair, and blue dangling earrings; 2) a much larger close-up action pose on the right, lunging diagonally toward the viewer with one arm and leg foreshortened, purple suit fabric catching bright magenta highlights, blond hair sweeping across the forehead, blue earring visible. Add two opaque skin-tone rectangular censor blocks over the faces: one small vertical rectangle covering the left figure’s face and one larger vertical rectangle covering the right figure’s face. Center text: place glowing Japanese tagline 「美しき蹴撃のイリュージョン」 above the title, then a huge cracked serif word KING in bright purple-white glow with a small crown icon above the center letters, then the bottom Japanese quote 「カモン、ベイビー！」 in white-purple glow. Visual style: premium SNK arcade fighting game splash art, polished anime illustration, dynamic foreshortening, glossy fabric highlights, electric purple aura, ornate faint flourishes behind the title, sharp rim lighting, explosive motion and impact effects, no extra characters, no watermark.
